stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows a regulated take-off mass (RTOM) table for Runway 23L from take-off position VB. Use the data below to determine the appropriate assumed FLEX temperature and V1, VR and V2 speeds. For this question do NOT interpolate. Choose the most conservative data at ALL times.

W/V: 050°/4 kt
OAT: +13°C
QNH: 1016 hPa
Runway: WET
Engine anti ice: OFF
Packs: OFF
Take of mass: 72 820 kg

options.a: 39°C and V1 134 kt; VR 137 kt and V2 142 kt
options.b: 41°C and V1 140 kt; VR 140 kt and V2 144 kt
options.c: 39°C and V1 131 kt; VR 137 kt and V2 142 kt
options.d: 41°C and V1 131 kt; VR 137 kt and V2 142 kt
